## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 pytest -q`
- [ ] Affected CLI/API workflow exercised
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated
